title: Security Cameras
description: Add an extra layer of security to your Minecraft base by adding security cameras that dm you using discordSRV
body:
Set up cameras to notify you on discord if someone goes near your base.
0 Config in config.yml for debugging

1 Link to DiscordSrv\
1.1 you should use the resource pack https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cameras to see your camera

2 Craft a camera using\
 ccc\
 reg\
 ccc\
    c = cobblestone\
    r = redstone_block\
    g = glass\
    e = eye of ender\

3 Place it in open areas within 10 blocks of any important entrances\

4 Wait for someone to come and it will notify you
